beginnersGuide.0:
Hover your mouse over \str[120] to check \str[120]'s status
Left-click on \str[120] to interact with \str[120]
beginnersGuide.1: Hold down the mouse on the background to call \str[120] to you
beginnersGuide.2: Touch and slide on \str[120] to engage in intimate interaction
beginnersGuide.3:
Right-click or long-press the right mouse
button to exit the skinShip mode
AndroidBeginnersGuide.0:
Tap on \str[120] to check her status
Hold on \str[120] to interact with her
AndroidBeginnersGuide.1: Press and hold on the background to call \str[120] to you
AndroidBeginnersGuide.2: Touch and slide on \str[120] to engage in intimate interaction
AndroidBeginnersGuide.3:
Tap the back button or
double-tap to exit
AndroidBeginnersGuide.4:
Game save files will be stored in \TC[#fff94e]Documents/sister_save\TC[#ffffff] 
on your device. Feel free to back them up or replace them 
with new save files! Saves from other devices are also supported 
PC and Android saves are fully compatible!
AndroidBeginnersGuide.5:
Note: You can only overwrite existing save files!
If you transfer a new save file without a matching record
the game won’t recognize it!
exitGame.0:
Do you want to return to the game’s title screen?
Any unsaved data will be lost.

44.51:
\nl< >"...\str[121]? That red bottle—   \w[45]
is that a new medicine!?"
44.52:
"Yeah, same as usual...
try mixing it with milk and drinking it?"
44.53: \nl< >"Yay~! I get to taste that sweet-and-sour flavor again!"
44.56: \nl< >"Next time, \str[121], you should try it too!"
44.57:
"Ah... yeah... 
as long as you can drink it without trouble..."
44.58:
It tastes good...
so why does it make me nauseous when I lick those fragments?
Is there really something different about 
Elixir Rubrum after the reddening reaction...?
44.59:
In any case, 
\str[120]’s mental state really has been improving gradually 
after taking the medicine, and that alone is enough to prove 
that Father’s experiment wasn’t a mistake. 
If things keep going like this, 
as long as I can get another four or five bottles of Elixir Rubrum,
maybe \str[120] really can recover enough to go outside again!
51.1:
\str[120] cheeks are flushed, and there’s a faint, 
sweet scent coming from her body, this is…
51.2: "What’s wrong? You were in such a hurry just now—"
51.3:
\nl< >"N-no, it’s nothing…!     \w[90]
It’s just that the milk tasted weird and made me 
feel like I had to rush to the toilet…!"
53.0:
\nl< >"\str[121], 
don’t bring up weird topics right now..."
53.1:
With a cheerful smile, 
I asked \str[120] what kind of panties she’s wearing now.
53.2:
\nl< >"Mm... \str[121],
do you really want to know that much?"
53.3:
\str[120] didn’t seem too resistant,
is this a chance?
53.4:
\nl< >"What’s wrong, \str[121]? 
Asking such a weird question..."
53.6:
Seeing \str[120]’s innocent expression, 
I turned my head away in shame.
53.7:
Unwilling to give up, I pressed \str[120] again about 
the kind of panties she’s wearing now.
53.8: \nl< >"Geez, I really can’t say no to you..."
53.13:
She trotted over and leaned close, whispering softly in my ear.
A faint citrus fragrance, carried on her warm breath, brushed against me—
sending a tingling shiver down my spine.
53.15:
\nl< >"Eh... \str[121],
what are you trying to do by asking that...?"
53.16: \str[120] just looked at me with a confused expression.
53.17:
Summoning all my courage, 
I asked \str[120] one last time what kind of panties 
she’s wearing now.
53.18:
\nl< >"\str[121] already knows, doesn’t? 
I’m not telling you again!"
53.20: I ended up making her angry...
